args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory class, createFactory, createMiddleware
- Reads as: 367 lines of TypeScript with complex generics for handler composition (1-10 handlers)
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
- Safe summary: Factory helper provides createApp and createHandlers for composing multiple handlers with typed environment merging.

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: 142 lines with route inspection utilities and WeakMap caching
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/utils/url, src/types
- Safe summary: Route inspection utilities to get matched routes, path info, and base paths during request handling.

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
- Reads as: 141 lines defining WebSocket upgrade types and event handlers
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types
- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for upgrading HTTP connections to WebSocket with typed event handlers.

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: 146 lines managing cookie parsing, signing, and setting with secure/host prefixes
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Cookie utilities for reading, writing, and managing signed cookies with security prefixes.

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: 27 lines creating test client from Hono app with custom fetch
- Neighbor files: src/client, src/context, src/types, src/utils/types
- Safe summary: Testing helper creates a client instance from a Hono app for request simulation.

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals, Runtime type
- Reads as: 91 lines detecting runtime environment (Node, Deno, Bun, etc.)
- Neighbor files: src/context
- Safe summary: Runtime detection utilities to identify execution environment and access platform-specific globals.

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
- Reads as: 253 lines CSS-in-JS with class name generation and style injection
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/helper/css/common
- Safe summary: Experimental CSS-in-JS helper for server-side rendering with hash-based class names.

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, minify, ClassNameSlug
- Reads as: 329 lines shared CSS utility functions and type definitions
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css
- Safe summary: Core CSS utilities providing template tag processing, class naming, and style string building.

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: 191 lines implementing RFC 9110 compliant HTTP proxy with header filtering
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Proxy helper for forwarding requests with hop-by-hop header removal and connection processing.

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: 80 lines displaying route information with optional colorization
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Development utilities for inspecting and displaying registered routes.

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: 58 lines building HTML escaped strings with callback support
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
- Safe summary: HTML helper for template strings with automatic escaping and callback execution.

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, defaultPlugin, ssgParams
- Reads as: 7 lines re-exports from ssg.ts and middleware.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: Index file re-exporting Static Site Generation utilities for static export.

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGOptions, ToSSGResult
- Reads as: 471 lines implementing concurrent static site generation
- Neighbor files: src/client/utils, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation with parallel route fetching and file writing.

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: 88 lines path manipulation and route filtering utilities
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Safe summary: Path handling utilities for safe file paths and static route detection.

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, isSSGContext, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
- Reads as: 84 lines SSG-specific request context middleware
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Safe summary: Middleware for managing SSG context, disabling, and onlySSG enforcement.

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
- Reads as: 10 lines re-exports from stream, sse, and text modules
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: Index file re-exporting streaming utilities for chunked responses.

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi, contextStash
- Reads as: 46 lines base streaming with TransformStream and Bun compatibility
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/utils.ts
- Safe summary: Base streaming helper with ReadableStream support and request context holding.

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: 100 lines Server-Sent Events streaming implementation
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/helper/streaming/utils.ts, src/utils/html
- Safe summary: SSE streaming with chunked encoding and event message handling.

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: 16 lines text-only streaming with appropriate Content-Type headers
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/helper/streaming
- Safe summary: Text streaming wrapper setting plain text headers over base stream.

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: 7 lines re-export from accepts.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Safe summary: Index file re-exporting accept header matching utility.

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts, Accept, acceptsOptions, defaultMatch
- Reads as: 50 lines parsing Accept headers and matching supported types
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Accept header parsing to determine preferred content type or language.

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo, ConnInfo, AddressType, NetAddrInfo
- Reads as: 7 lines type re-exports from types.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Safe summary: Index file exporting connection information types.

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: 46 lines defining connection info type structures
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Safe summary: Type definitions for remote connection address and port information.
